title: texas war of independence
subject: texas war of independence
program_outcome: This syllabus introduces learners to the Texas War of Independence, covering its causes, key political events, major battles, significant historical figures, and the aftermath, including the establishment of the Republic of Texas.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: Overview of the Texas War of Independence, its significance, and historical context.
terminal: Explain the significance of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify the geopolitical context of early 19th-century North America
Describe the initial settlement of Texas by American colonists

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: Examine the political, social, and economic causes leading to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify and explain the main causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the role of Mexican policies in Texas unrest
Analyze the impact of cultural differences between settlers and Mexican authorities

classes.title: Key Political Events and Figures
classes.summary: Explore the political landscape and key figures involved in the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify major political events and figures in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Describe the role of Stephen F. Austin and Sam Houston
Explain the significance of the Texas Declaration of Independence

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: Detailed examination of the major battles during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Summarize the outcomes of key battles in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Describe the events of the Battle of the Alamo
Explain the significance of the Battle of San Jacinto

classes.title: Historical Figures and Folklore
classes.summary: Study of notable historical figures and folklore from the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify and describe key figures and folklore associated with the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the legacy of Davy Crockett and Jim Bowie
Analyze the role of folklore in shaping public perception

classes.title: The Rough Riders and Sam Houston
classes.summary: Examine the contributions of the Rough Riders and Sam Houston to Texas' independence and legacy.
terminal: Explain the contributions of the Rough Riders and Sam Houston to the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the leadership style of Sam Houston
Describe the role of the Rough Riders in the war

classes.title: The Republic of Texas
classes.summary: Explore the establishment and challenges of the Republic of Texas post-independence.
terminal: Describe the formation and early challenges of the Republic of Texas
enabling: Explain the political structure of the Republic of Texas
Analyze the Republic's relations with Mexico and the United States
